---
title: "About"
format: html
---

The dashboard and accompanying pages were built in R using Quarto and an R package developed for this purpose.
Data source details, a digest of data trends, and the dashboard hierarchy are each provided below.

# Dataset information

> **Full dataset name:** "Canada’s Energy Future 2023: Energy Supply and Demand Projections to 2050"
>
> **Dataset page:** <https://open.canada.ca/data/en/dataset/7643c948-d661-4d90-ab91-e9ac732fc737>
>
> **Data source:** Open Government (<https://open.canada.ca/en>)
>
> **Record ID:** 7643c948-d661-4d90-ab91-e9ac732fc737
>
> **Digital Object Identifier (DOI):** <https://doi.org/10.35002/zppg-yr91>
>
> **Organization Name:** Canada Energy Regulator (CER) / Régie de l'énergie du Canada (REC)

------------------------------------------------------------------------

# Dashboard hierarchy

```         
Dashboard Page
  ├ Overview
  ├ Production
  │ ├ Crude Oil
  │ │ ├ Total
  │ │ ├ (Upgraded Bitumen)
  │ │ ├ C5+
  │ │ ├ Conventional Heavy
  │ │ ├ Conventional Light
  │ │ ├ Field Condensate
  │ │ ├ In Situ Bitumen
  │ │ └ Mined Bitumen
  │ ├ Hydrogen
  │ │ ├ Total (calculated)
  │ │ ├ Biomass
  │ │ ├ Electrolysis
  │ │ └ Natural gas with CCS
  │ └ Natural Gas
  │   ├ Total
  │   ├ Solution
  │   ├ Non Associated
  │   ├ Tight
  │   ├ Shale
  │   └ Coalbed Methane
  ├ Financials
  │ ├ Benchmark Prices
  │ │ ├ Crude Oil
  │ │ └ Natural Gas
  │ ├ End Use Prices
  │ │ ├ ...
  │ │ ├ ...
  │ │ ├ ...
  │ │ └ ...
  │ └ Macro Indicators
  │   └ ...
  └ ...
```

------------------------------------------------------------------------

# Notes

**Note on tabs:** Tabs are sorted by decreasing total quantity (as per value cards). This means the top category is listed second, following Total.

**Note on years:** Years 2022 (latest current data), 2030 (interim near-net-zero target), 2035 (*negotiated* interim near-net-zero target as per the [Canada-Alberta MOU](https://www.pm.gc.ca/en/news/backgrounders/2025/11/27/canada-alberta-memorandum-understanding)), and 2050 (target year as per EF2023/the [Canadian Net-Zero Emissions Accountability Act](https://www.canada.ca/en/services/environment/weather/climatechange/climate-plan/net-zero-emissions-2050/canadian-net-zero-emissions-accountability-act.html)) are highlighted.

**Navigation hints:** Single- or double-click legend items. Categories in hierarchical ("icicle") charts are clickable.

<!-- **Project timeline:** -->

<!-- -   2026-02-26: Project started -->

<!-- -   2026-02-26: First tab (Production \> Oil \> Total) created -->

<!-- -   2026-02-27: Tab layout established -->

<!-- -   2026-02-28: Oil tab completed -->

<!-- -   2026-02-28: Production tab completed -->

<!-- -   2026-02-28: Added Financials section -->

<!-- -   2026-03-01: Financials \> Benchmarks built -->

<!-- -   2026-03-01: Production \> Crude Oil: Standardized CSS (incl. narrow screens) -->

<!-- -   2026-03-01: Standardized nomenclature. Added trend indicators for scenario cards -->

<!-- -   2026-03-02: All \> graphs: Highlighted key years -->

<!-- ... -->

------------------------------------------------------------------------

**Contact:**

At any time, requests for data projects or information on project development are welcome.
